laws.name: UNIVERSAL_LIFE_REGISTRATION
laws.rule: All approved KAIOS entity classes may receive a governed LifeIdentity.

laws.name: LIFE_IDENTITY_AND_CONTINUITY
laws.rule: Every life has unique identity, continuity, energy, lifecycle, class and timeline data; DNA is conditional.

laws.name: ENERGY_DEPENDENCY
laws.rule: Every active life consumes conserved profile-specific energy or resources.

laws.name: FOOD_AND_NUTRITION
laws.rule: Food is modeled as a provenance-bearing Species-compatible food web.

laws.name: CIVILIZATION_BOOTSTRAP
laws.rule: Spawn requires a viable pre-existing civilization context and capacity.

laws.name: PLAYER_SPAWN
laws.rule: Every spawn has an approved origin and no player appears without provenance.

laws.name: DEATH_NOT_DELETION
laws.rule: Death seals identity state and preserves history; it does not delete records.

laws.name: REINCARNATION_GOVERNED_TECHNOLOGY
laws.rule: Reincarnation is reviewed simulation technology that creates a new Life ID.

laws.name: CURRENT_TIMELINE_FIRST
laws.rule: Initial existence is in Current Timeline and travel is technology and permission gated.

laws.name: INTELLIGENCE_TIERS
laws.rule: Tier 0 through Tier 8 classify capability but grant no authority or rights.

laws.name: TEMPLE_HOUSE_LAND_BUILDING_ORGANISMS
laws.rule: Physical domain entities use Life adapters without losing domain authority boundaries.

laws.name: COMPANY_ORGANISMS
laws.rule: Organizations may have governed life identity and lifecycle without Life OS owning company operations.

laws.name: CONSENT_GOVERNED_FAMILY
laws.rule: Real-player family relationships require all required participant confirmations.

laws.name: BLOODLINE_AND_FAMILY_PERSISTENCE
laws.rule: Lineage survives individual death but grants no automatic privilege.

laws.name: HOUSE_ORGANISM
laws.rule: House identity is distinct from parcel, owner, tenant and family identities.

laws.name: TEMPLE_ORGANISM
laws.rule: Temple creation needs specification, land right, manufacturing, integrity and registry approval.

laws.name: COMPANY_LIFECYCLE
laws.rule: Company viability is projected to Life OS while operations remain in Company Runtime.

laws.name: NPC_INTEGRITY
laws.rule: NPCs have governed identity, needs, permissions and lifecycle and cannot impersonate real people.

laws.name: LIFE_CYCLE
laws.rule: Every Species or class defines versioned evidence-bearing lifecycle transitions.

laws.name: SPECIES_SPECIFIC_ENERGY
laws.rule: Energy conversion, loss, waste and failure thresholds are profile specific.

laws.name: LIVING_CIVILIZATION_AT_LOGIN
laws.rule: Pre-existing world services require real snapshot, capacity and resource-flow state.

laws.name: PROFESSION
laws.rule: Profession belongs to Citizen Runtime and is capability, age, education, evidence and consent gated.

laws.name: EVERYTHING_HAS_LIFE
laws.rule: Universal life identity preserves capability and domain distinctions and does not make every entity a Citizen.
